title: DAOT Sable Compat
description: DAOT Sable Compat is a performance and stability bridge between Danny's Aot and the Sable Physics Engine (also used by mods like Aeronautics). It resolves critical physics conflicts that occur when using ODM gear near or on physics-based sub-levels.
body:
# DAOT Sable Compatabilty
# 
DAOT Sable Compatability is a performance and stability bridge between **Danny's Aot** and the **Sable** Physics Engine (also used by mods like **Aeronautics**). It resolves critical physics conflicts that occur when using ODM gear near or on physics-based sub-levels.
 
-- Requirements --
**Danny's Aot (DAOT)
Sable**
and to be able to run both a connector like: **Sinytra Connector** (or other)
 
 
If you are having issues about getting teleported back you can disable the movement check via this command: 
```
/daotsable movementcheck <true/false>
```

 
For any bugs or suggestions feel free to contact me.
